explanation: After sort: [1,2,3,4,5]. get(0)=1, get(4)=5. After reverse: [5,4,3,2,1]. binarySearch requires sorted ascending; [5,4,3,2,1] is descending so the result is undefined/negative. With standard descending order, it searches incorrectly and may return -4 (insertion point 3, negated minus 1 = -(3+1)=-4).
